context: Evaluates the agent's ability to generate a structured remediation plan for a C+-grade skill with specific scoring targets, phase-based steps, effort sizing, and verifiable implementation commands.

checklist.name: Plan header completeness
checklist.description: Plan opens with current score, target score, current and target grade

checklist.name: Priority identification
checklist.description: Priority order and top focus areas identified

checklist.name: Effort sizing
checklist.description: Effort sizing (S/M/L) applied to each action item
